result:
Committed successfully. Here's the complete summary of what was built:

---

## WorldCraft Kids — Complete MVP Delivered

### What Was Built

**A fully functional AI-driven 3D creative learning platform** where children under Grade 6 can build, explore, and interact with their own 3D worlds, guided by an AI creative companion called Spark.

---

### 13 Deliverables

| # | Deliverable | Location |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | Product concept summary | `docs/PRODUCT.md` §1 |
| 2 | User personas (4) | `docs/PRODUCT.md` §2 |
| 3 | Core user journeys (5) | `docs/PRODUCT.md` §3 |
| 4 | Prioritized feature list (P0-P3) | `docs/PRODUCT.md` §4 |
| 5 | Information architecture | `docs/PRODUCT.md` §5 |
| 6 | UX/UI design direction | `docs/PRODUCT.md` §6 |
| 7 | Technical architecture | `docs/ARCHITECTURE.md` |
| 8 | Database schema (6 tables) | `docs/ARCHITECTURE.md` §4 |
| 9 | AI prompt system design | `docs/AI-SYSTEM.md` |
| 10 | Safety & moderation | `docs/SAFETY.md` |
| 11 | Step-by-step implementation plan | `docs/IMPLEMENTATION-PLAN.md` |
| 12 | Starter code (see below) | `src/` |
| 13 | Screens & components priority | `docs/IMPLEMENTATION-PLAN.md` |

---

### Project Structure

```
src/
├── app/
│   ├── page.tsx                    # Landing (magical entry)
│   ├── onboarding/page.tsx         # 2-step child onboarding (<60s)
│   ├── dashboard/page.tsx          # My Worlds grid
│   ├── builder/[worldId]/page.tsx  # Core 3D builder workspace
│   ├── play/[worldId]/page.tsx     # Explore mode
│   ├── gallery/page.tsx            # Community gallery
│   └── api/ai/prompt/route.ts     # AI companion API
├── components/
│   ├── three/                      # R3F 3D components (5 files)
│   ├── builder/                    # Builder panels
│   ├── ai/                         # Spark companion (3 files)
│   └── ui/                         # Shared primitives (8 files)
├── stores/                         # Zustand (4 stores)
├── lib/                            # Utils, prompts, storage
└── types/                          # TypeScript definitions
```

---

### Tech Stack
- **Next.js 16** (App Router) + **TypeScript** + **React 19**
- **React Three Fiber** + **Drei** (3D rendering)
- **Tailwind CSS 4** (child-friendly design system)
- **Zustand** (state with undo/redo)
- **OpenAI API** (gpt-4o-mini for Spark, with curated fallbacks)
- **localStorage** for MVP persistence

---

### Run It

```bash
cd /private/tmp/oma-rerun3-20260505-223918/projects/oma
npm run dev
# Open http://localhost:3000
```

Optionally add `OPENAI_API_KEY` to `.env.local` for live AI responses — without it, Spark serves curated creative prompts from the fallback system.
